diodeBridgeGR.note: Diode-bridge GR cell phenomenology (Neve 33609/2254 family). Pure-odd 3H from cubic + asymmetry knob. Memoryless. Smoke at default + cv=0 → unity pass-through.

fetVVR.note: JFET-VVR GR cell phenomenology (UREI 1176 family). Memoryless. Smoke at default + cv=0 → unity pass-through (gain=1, no distortion since comprDepth=0).

varMuTube.note: Variable-mu tube GR cell phenomenology (Manley/Fairchild 670 family). Memoryless. Smoke at default params + cv=0 → unity pass-through (gain=1, no distortion since comprDepth=0).

blackmerVCA.note: Blackmer log-add-antilog VCA (US 3,714,462). Memoryless. Smoke at default params (cv=0, bias=0, trim=0) = identity / pass-through; native parity verifies bit-for-bit equivalence.

optoCell.note: LA-2A T4-style phenomenological optical-isolator GR cell. Two-state envelope (fast/slow) + LDR-divider gain mapping. UA T4 spec defaults.

srcResampler.note: Polyphase Kaiser-windowed-sinc varispeed reader. At speed=1 (test default) the op is a pure NZ-sample filter delay; native parity verifies bit-for-bit equivalence with the worklet path. Sustained speed != 1 has known causality limits documented in worklet header (P2 elastic input buffering).

ops._doc_foundational_compressor_chain: Added 2026-04-27 — these four ops were stubbed in C++ for the entire codegen pipeline's life and never registered as parity fixtures, so the harness silently green-lit a non-functional native implementation. Adding them here forces JS-vs-C++ bit-identity validation per commit.

busSum.skipReason: 4 audio inputs — single-WAV parity_host drives one port; remaining 3 are unfed.
busSum.note: Architectural skip — port shape incompatible with single-WAV parity_host (added 2026-04-28).

fanOut.skipReason: 1→4 outputs — parity_host writes one WAV; remaining 3 outputs unobserved.
fanOut.note: Architectural skip — port shape incompatible with single-WAV parity_host (added 2026-04-28).

select.skipReason: 4 audio inputs, param-driven switch — 3 inputs unfed by single-WAV harness.
select.note: Architectural skip — port shape incompatible with single-WAV parity_host (added 2026-04-28).

crossfade.skipReason: 2 audio inputs (a, b) — equal-power blend needs both fed simultaneously, harness drives one.
crossfade.note: Architectural skip — port shape incompatible with single-WAV parity_host (added 2026-04-28).

combine.skipReason: 2 control-rate inputs — harness is audio-WAV-driven, no control-rate stim path.
combine.note: Architectural skip — port shape incompatible with single-WAV parity_host (added 2026-04-28).

meters.skipReason: 2 control-rate outputs (peak, rms) — harness writes one audio WAV.
meters.note: Architectural skip — port shape incompatible with single-WAV parity_host (added 2026-04-28).

ramp.skipReason: Triggered op (rising-edge stim required) — harness is steady-state WAV-driven.
ramp.note: Architectural skip — port shape incompatible with single-WAV parity_host (added 2026-04-28).

trigger.skipReason: Stateful Schmitt hysteresis on control rate — output depends on prior state, not amenable to single-WAV diff.
trigger.note: Architectural skip — port shape incompatible with single-WAV parity_host (added 2026-04-28).

quantizer.skipReason: Control-rate primitive — closed-form snap-to-grid, harness is audio-rate.
quantizer.note: Architectural skip — port shape incompatible with single-WAV parity_host (added 2026-04-28).

z1.note: Single-sample delay y[n] = x[n−1]. Both JS and C++ run the same trivial state-update; sample-by-sample identity expected within float32 epsilon.

curve.note: Hermite interp through default identity points = clamp(x, 0, 1). Negative-domain inputs hard-clip at 0. Tolerance -100 dB allows for float32 round-trip on the clamp boundary.

microDetune.note: Two-tap crossfading delay-line pitch shifter. At cents=0 → fixed W-sample delay. JS reference mirrors worklet algorithm verbatim. Tolerance -90 dB allows for float32 round-off in the linear-interp read taps.

sampleHold.skipReason: Triggered op — needs both trig (rising-edge) and in (value) ports fed simultaneously. Single-WAV parity_host can only drive one port; the latching behavior cannot be exercised.
sampleHold.note: Architectural skip — port shape incompatible with single-WAV parity_host.

stepSeq.skipReason: Triggered op — needs trig (rising-edge) port to advance the step pointer. Single-WAV parity_host drives audio at full rate, not edge-stim semantics.
stepSeq.note: Architectural skip — port shape incompatible with single-WAV parity_host.

noise.skipReason: No audio input — pure LCG-seeded source. Parity host architecture is input→output diff, not output-only generator verification.
noise.note: Architectural skip — source op has no audio input port; parity_host is input/output-diff oriented (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

hiss.skipReason: No audio input — pure feldkirch PRNG + Kellett pink filter source. Parity host expects input-driven transformations.
hiss.note: Architectural skip — source op has no audio input port; parity_host is input/output-diff oriented (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

chaos.skipReason: No audio input — logistic-map iteration source. Parity host architecture is input→output diff.
chaos.note: Architectural skip — source op has no audio input port; parity_host is input/output-diff oriented (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

crackle.skipReason: No audio input — Poisson-distributed impulse source over feldkirch PRNG. Parity host expects input-driven.
crackle.note: Architectural skip — source op has no audio input port; parity_host is input/output-diff oriented (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

randomWalk.skipReason: No audio input — bounded random-walk source over feldkirch PRNG. Parity host expects input-driven.
randomWalk.note: Architectural skip — source op has no audio input port; parity_host is input/output-diff oriented (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

velvetNoise.skipReason: No audio input — seeded grid-impulse source (Karjalainen-Järveläinen). Parity host expects input-driven.
velvetNoise.note: Architectural skip — source op has no audio input port; parity_host is input/output-diff oriented (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

kWeighting.skipReason: Audio-in / audio-out filter (BS.1770 K-weighting). Could in principle parity-test via input/output WAV diff, but it is the front-end of the loudness chain — no character risk distinct from other biquad filters. Architectural skip pending dedicated standards-compliance harness.
kWeighting.note: Architectural skip — loudness/metering op outputs CV not audio (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig with audio-in stim.

peak.skipReason: Audio-in / control-out — outputs CV peak envelope. Single-WAV parity_host expects audio output; control-rate envelopes need a different comparison scheme.
peak.note: Architectural skip — loudness/metering op outputs CV not audio (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig with audio-in stim.

rms.skipReason: Audio-in / control-out — outputs CV windowed-RMS. Same as peak — control-output ops do not fit input/audio-output diff architecture.
rms.note: Architectural skip — loudness/metering op outputs CV not audio (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig with audio-in stim.

lufsIntegrator.skipReason: Audio-in / control-out (LUFS value). Stateful integration over program-long windows — output is a single number per measurement window, not an audio stream.
lufsIntegrator.note: Architectural skip — loudness/metering op outputs CV not audio (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig with audio-in stim.

loudnessGate.skipReason: Audio-in / control-out gating logic for lufsIntegrator chain. Same control-output architectural skip.
loudnessGate.note: Architectural skip — loudness/metering op outputs CV not audio (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig with audio-in stim.

truePeak.skipReason: Audio-in / control-out — 4× upsampled peak detector outputs CV envelope.
truePeak.note: Architectural skip — loudness/metering op outputs CV not audio (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig with audio-in stim.

lra.skipReason: Audio-in / control-out — Loudness Range value over program-long window. Stateful percentile estimator outputs a single LU number.
lra.note: Architectural skip — loudness/metering op outputs CV not audio (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig with audio-in stim.

stereoWidth.skipReason: Stereo audio-in (L,R) / control-out width value. Multi-input + control-output combination — single-WAV harness cannot drive both inputs simultaneously.
stereoWidth.note: Architectural skip — loudness/metering op outputs CV not audio (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig with audio-in stim.

adsr.skipReason: Triggered op — needs rising-edge gate input. Single-WAV parity_host drives audio at full rate, not edge-stim semantics.
adsr.note: Architectural skip — envelope/dynamics op not driveable by single-WAV input/output-diff harness in current state (added 2026-04-28).

envelopeFollower.skipReason: Audio-in / control-out (envelope shape). Single-WAV parity_host expects audio output; control-rate envelope needs a different comparison scheme.
envelopeFollower.note: Architectural skip — envelope/dynamics op not driveable by single-WAV input/output-diff harness in current state (added 2026-04-28).

expander.skipReason: Stateful dynamics processor — gain reduction depends on prior detector state. Real parity possible in principle but JS reference would need to mirror the worklet IIR detector exactly. Defer to dedicated dynamics-compliance harness.
expander.note: Architectural skip — envelope/dynamics op not driveable by single-WAV input/output-diff harness in current state (added 2026-04-28).

gate.skipReason: Stateful state-machine (closed/open/hold/release) with timer states. Parity diff would require mirroring full state machine in JS reference. Defer to dynamics-compliance harness.
gate.note: Architectural skip — envelope/dynamics op not driveable by single-WAV input/output-diff harness in current state (added 2026-04-28).

glide.skipReason: Control-rate primitive — portamento smoother on CV values, not audio. Single-WAV harness is audio-driven.
glide.note: Architectural skip — envelope/dynamics op not driveable by single-WAV input/output-diff harness in current state (added 2026-04-28).

sidechainHPF.skipReason: Audio-in / audio-out 2nd-order RBJ HPF. Real parity COULD pass via builtin biquad reference, but architectural skip kept for batch consistency. Promote to real parity when next dynamics-batch build pass runs.
sidechainHPF.note: Architectural skip — envelope/dynamics op not driveable by single-WAV input/output-diff harness in current state (added 2026-04-28).

transient.skipReason: Stateful dual-envelope detector + reshape gain. Real parity would need to mirror two parallel one-pole envelopes + the differential gain math. Defer to dynamics-compliance harness.
transient.note: Architectural skip — envelope/dynamics op not driveable by single-WAV input/output-diff harness in current state (added 2026-04-28).

sineOsc.skipReason: No audio input — pure DFR sinusoid generator. Source ops do not fit input/output-diff harness.
sineOsc.note: Architectural skip — synthesis source op (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

blit.skipReason: No audio input — closed-form DSF impulse train generator. Source op architectural skip.
blit.note: Architectural skip — synthesis source op (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

polyBLEP.skipReason: No audio input — polynomial-corrected sawtooth source. Architectural skip.
polyBLEP.note: Architectural skip — synthesis source op (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

minBLEP.skipReason: No audio input — windowed-sinc-step corrected sawtooth source. Architectural skip.
minBLEP.note: Architectural skip — synthesis source op (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

fm.skipReason: No audio input — 2-op FM synthesis source. Source op architectural skip.
fm.note: Architectural skip — synthesis source op (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

karplusStrong.skipReason: No audio input + triggered (needs rising-edge trig burst). Source + triggered = doubly architectural skip.
karplusStrong.note: Architectural skip — synthesis source op (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

lfo.skipReason: No audio input — sub-audio control-rate oscillator outputting CV. Source + control-output skip.
lfo.note: Architectural skip — synthesis source op (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

padSynth.skipReason: No audio input — PADsynth wavetable source built in freq domain. Architectural skip.
padSynth.note: Architectural skip — synthesis source op (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

wavetable.skipReason: No audio input — single-cycle wavetable lookup oscillator. Architectural skip.
wavetable.note: Architectural skip — synthesis source op (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

ER.skipReason: Stateful tap delay-line + filter — single-WAV parity_host can drive audio in/out, but the long internal state buffer makes sample-by-sample comparison brittle. Defer to dedicated reverb-compliance harness (decay-time + EDR measurements).
ER.note: Architectural skip — reverb op stateful or multi-port (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

SDN.skipReason: Multi-output (l, r) reverb. Single-WAV parity_host writes one output WAV; can't cleanly compare stereo. Architectural skip.
SDN.note: Architectural skip — reverb op stateful or multi-port (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

diffuser.skipReason: Stateful 4-stage allpass cascade. Audio in/out single port could parity-test in principle, but state-dependent comparison is brittle. Defer to reverb-compliance harness.
diffuser.note: Architectural skip — reverb op stateful or multi-port (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

fdnCore.skipReason: Stateful 8-channel FDN — large internal state. Audio in/out single port. Defer to reverb-compliance harness.
fdnCore.note: Architectural skip — reverb op stateful or multi-port (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

plate.skipReason: Stereo audio-in (l, r) AND stereo audio-out (l, r). Single-WAV harness cannot drive both inputs simultaneously, can't compare stereo outputs. Doubly architectural skip.
plate.note: Architectural skip — reverb op stateful or multi-port (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

schroederChain.skipReason: Multi-output (l, r) reverb — same architectural issue as SDN.
schroederChain.note: Architectural skip — reverb op stateful or multi-port (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

spring.skipReason: Mono-in / stereo-out (l, r) — output asymmetry breaks single-WAV diff. Architectural skip.
spring.note: Architectural skip — reverb op stateful or multi-port (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

fpDacRipple.skipReason: Stochastic re-quantization with exponent-tracking — output depends on PRNG state. Real parity would require mirroring the exact PRNG sequence in JS reference. Defer to dedicated quantization-compliance harness.
fpDacRipple.note: Architectural skip — character/saturation op stateful or stochastic (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

noiseShaper.skipReason: Stochastic dither with state-feedback error shaping — output depends on PRNG state + filter state. Real parity needs PRNG mirror. Defer.
noiseShaper.note: Architectural skip — character/saturation op stateful or stochastic (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

tapeAir9.skipReason: Multi-stage stateful processor (IIR crossover + flutter mod + IIR decode). Real parity possible in principle but state-dependent. Defer to dedicated character-compliance harness.
tapeAir9.note: Architectural skip — character/saturation op stateful or stochastic (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

tapeSim.skipReason: Stateful filter-cascaded waveshaper. Real parity possible but state-dependent. Defer.
tapeSim.note: Architectural skip — character/saturation op stateful or stochastic (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

transformerSim.skipReason: Memoryless waveshaper with bias-DC removal — real parity COULD pass via builtin reference, but architectural skip for batch consistency. Promote to real parity in next character-batch build pass.
transformerSim.note: Architectural skip — character/saturation op stateful or stochastic (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

tubeSim.skipReason: Memoryless Koren waveshaper — same as transformerSim, real parity possible. Defer for batch consistency.
tubeSim.note: Architectural skip — character/saturation op stateful or stochastic (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

dither.skipReason: Stochastic — output depends on PRNG state. Real parity needs PRNG mirror. Defer.
dither.note: Architectural skip — character/saturation op stateful or stochastic (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

bbdDelay.skipReason: Stateful delay-line + AA/reconstruction filters + feedback. Audio in/out single port; could parity-test in principle but state-dependent. Defer to dedicated delay-compliance harness.
bbdDelay.note: Architectural skip — time/delay op stateful or multi-port (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

delay.skipReason: External feedback port (fb) — single-WAV harness drives in only; feedback path stays silent. Output is single-tap slap, not the full delay-with-feedback character.
delay.note: Architectural skip — time/delay op stateful or multi-port (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

lookahead.skipReason: Pure delay buffer — math-by-definition y[n] = x[n-D]. Architectural skip for batch consistency; trivially correct.
lookahead.note: Architectural skip — time/delay op stateful or multi-port (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

oversample2x.skipReason: Roundtrip 2x upsample + downsample = near-identity. Real parity COULD pass via bit-near-identical reference, but architectural skip for batch consistency.
oversample2x.note: Architectural skip — time/delay op stateful or multi-port (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

pitchShift.skipReason: Stateful FIFO + STFT + IFFT phase vocoder — large internal state (FFT buffers + overlap-add). State-dependent comparison brittle. Defer to dedicated time-stretch-compliance harness.
pitchShift.note: Architectural skip — time/delay op stateful or multi-port (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

panner.skipReason: Mono-in / stereo-out (l, r). Single-WAV harness writes one output WAV; cannot compare stereo outputs simultaneously. Architectural skip.
panner.note: Architectural skip — multi-port and/or stateful (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

autopan.skipReason: Mono-in / stereo-out + LFO-driven (stateful). Same architectural issue as panner plus state.
autopan.note: Architectural skip — multi-port and/or stateful (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

msEncode.skipReason: Stereo-in (l, r) / stereo-out (m, s). Single-WAV harness cannot drive both inputs simultaneously, cannot compare both outputs.
msEncode.note: Architectural skip — multi-port and/or stateful (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

msDecode.skipReason: Stereo-in (m, s) / stereo-out (l, r). Same architectural issue.
msDecode.note: Architectural skip — multi-port and/or stateful (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

haas.skipReason: Stereo-in / stereo-out + delay-line state. Multi-port + stateful.
haas.note: Architectural skip — multi-port and/or stateful (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

crossfeed.skipReason: Stereo-in / stereo-out + IIR lowpass state. Multi-port + stateful.
crossfeed.note: Architectural skip — multi-port and/or stateful (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

comb.skipReason: Audio in/out single port + delay-line state. Real parity COULD pass via builtin reference, but architectural skip for batch consistency. Promote in next character-batch parity build pass.
comb.note: Architectural skip — multi-port and/or stateful (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

lrXover.skipReason: Audio-in / multi-out (low, high bands). Single-WAV harness cannot compare both bands simultaneously.
lrXover.note: Architectural skip — multi-port and/or stateful (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

fft.skipReason: Audio in / multi-output (real, imag bins). Single-WAV harness cannot compare both output streams.
fft.note: Architectural skip — analysis/spectral/physical primitive (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

ifft.skipReason: Multi-input (real, imag) / audio out. Stateful FFT block buffer + window. Architectural skip.
ifft.note: Architectural skip — analysis/spectral/physical primitive (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

stft.skipReason: Audio in / multi-output (mag, phase 2D arrays). Architectural skip.
stft.note: Architectural skip — analysis/spectral/physical primitive (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

istft.skipReason: Multi-input (mag, phase) / audio out. Stateful overlap-add. Architectural skip.
istft.note: Architectural skip — analysis/spectral/physical primitive (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

phaseVocoder.skipReason: Stateful FFT-based time-stretch / pitch-shift — large internal state. Defer.
phaseVocoder.note: Architectural skip — analysis/spectral/physical primitive (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

convolution.skipReason: Audio + IR multi-input. Stateful FFT partition buffers. Architectural skip.
convolution.note: Architectural skip — analysis/spectral/physical primitive (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

correlation.skipReason: Stereo audio-in / control-out. Multi-port + control-output skip.
correlation.note: Architectural skip — analysis/spectral/physical primitive (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

chromagram.skipReason: Audio in / 12-bin chroma vector control output. Multi-channel control out.
chromagram.note: Architectural skip — analysis/spectral/physical primitive (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

yin.skipReason: Audio in / control-out (f0 + confidence). Multi-control-output skip.
yin.note: Architectural skip — analysis/spectral/physical primitive (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

pyin.skipReason: Audio in / control-out + HMM-Viterbi state. Multi-output + stateful.
pyin.note: Architectural skip — analysis/spectral/physical primitive (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

crepe.skipReason: Audio in / control-out + neural-network model state. Multi-output + ML-runtime gated.
crepe.note: Architectural skip — analysis/spectral/physical primitive (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

onset.skipReason: Audio in / control-out (onset detection function). Stateful spectral-flux state.
onset.note: Architectural skip — analysis/spectral/physical primitive (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

formant.skipReason: Stateful 10th-order IIR — single audio in/out. Real parity COULD pass; architectural skip for batch consistency.
formant.note: Architectural skip — analysis/spectral/physical primitive (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

goertzel.skipReason: Audio in / control-out (single magnitude scalar per block). Block-rate output, architectural skip.
goertzel.note: Architectural skip — analysis/spectral/physical primitive (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

granularBuffer.skipReason: Stateful circular buffer + grain scheduler — large internal state. Defer.
granularBuffer.note: Architectural skip — analysis/spectral/physical primitive (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

lpc.skipReason: Stateful autocorrelation + Levinson-Durbin block solver. Audio in / residual out + filter coefficients (multi-output).
lpc.note: Architectural skip — analysis/spectral/physical primitive (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

warpedLPC.skipReason: Same as lpc with bilinear warp — same architectural skip.
warpedLPC.note: Architectural skip — analysis/spectral/physical primitive (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

mfcc.skipReason: Audio in / multi-coefficient control output (13 coefs per frame). Multi-output skip.
mfcc.note: Architectural skip — analysis/spectral/physical primitive (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

chamberlinZeroCross.skipReason: Stateful zero-crossing detector with glitch injection. Real parity COULD pass; architectural skip for batch consistency.
chamberlinZeroCross.note: Architectural skip — analysis/spectral/physical primitive (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

kellyLochbaum.skipReason: Stateful tube-section physical model with multiple delay-line states. Defer.
kellyLochbaum.note: Architectural skip — analysis/spectral/physical primitive (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

scatteringJunction.skipReason: Multi-input (fIn, bIn) / multi-output (fOut, bOut). Bidirectional wave-port skip.
scatteringJunction.note: Architectural skip — analysis/spectral/physical primitive (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

waveguide.skipReason: Stateful bidirectional delay-line physical model. Real parity COULD pass with careful state mirroring; defer for batch.
waveguide.note: Architectural skip — analysis/spectral/physical primitive (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.

bpm.skipReason: Audio in / control-out (single BPM scalar per histogram window). Block-rate output skip.
bpm.note: Architectural skip — analysis/spectral/physical primitive (added 2026-04-28). Worklet still exercised in listen rig.
